message:
fix(conformance): track optimization gate fixtures in repo instead of ignored artifacts/

Move phase2c optimization gate test fixtures from artifacts/ (gitignored)
to crates/fr-conformance/fixtures/optimization_gate/phase2c-gate/ (tracked).
Update optimization_root() path in phase2c_schema.rs to use the tracked
fixture location.

This fixes the optimization_gate_validates_canonical_round_artifacts test
failing on clean clones and remote workers where artifacts/ doesn't exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+# Optimization Gate Fixtures
+
+This directory is the tracked source of truth for `phase2c_schema` optimization-gate tests.
+
+Rules:
+- unit tests in `crates/fr-conformance/src/phase2c_schema.rs` must read from this tracked fixture bundle
+- the `phase2c_schema_gate --optimization-gate` CLI still validates the live runtime artifact root at `artifacts/optimization/phase2c-gate`
+- do not make tests depend on ignored `artifacts/` contents
+
+The current canonical fixture pack is:
+
+- `phase2c-gate/`
+  - `bench_packets/`
+  - `round_dir_scan_mask/`

+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+set -euo pipefail
+
+script_dir="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+repo_root="$(cd "$script_dir/../../../../.." && pwd)"
+bin="$repo_root/target-local/debug/phase2c_schema_gate"
+
+mapfile -t args < <(find "$script_dir/bench_packets" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d | sort)
+"$bin" "${args[@]}"
